creator: vince@blue-box.net
text:
update syslog-ng to 1.4.7

How-To-Repeat: 
diff -ruN syslog-ng.old/Makefile syslog-ng/Makefile
--- syslog-ng.old/Makefile	Mon Oct  2 12:48:00 2000
+++ syslog-ng/Makefile	Mon Oct  2 12:48:17 2000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	syslog-ng
-PORTVERSION=	1.4.5
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.7
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.balabit.hu/downloads/syslog-ng/1.4/
 
diff -ruN syslog-ng.old/files/md5 syslog-ng/files/md5
--- syslog-ng.old/files/md5	Mon Oct  2 12:48:00 2000
+++ syslog-ng/files/md5	Mon Oct  2 12:49:14 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (syslog-ng-1.4.5.tar.gz) = 623f421f6ff660482fc0805025d14c39
+MD5 (syslog-ng-1.4.7.tar.gz) = f3b57725842a8a98f8ac5998eff11913
